Merge resolution complete. Code gates green.
Implemented method: primary research exemption. ResearchMethod enum + parse_research_method + validator guard. 1316 tests pass, clippy clean, cairn scan --strict exit 0.
Superseded by cairn-mj1: agent-experiment-linklint.md now declares method: primary, which the validator exempts from CAIRN_RESEARCH_MISSING_SOURCES.

Moot: dev branch retired and deleted 2026-06-17 (fully merged into main, 0 unique commits, default already main). Back-port-to-dev premise no longer applies; file-size allow-list annotations already exist on main.
Moot: dev branch retired and deleted 2026-06-17. Degenerate interface-hash fix already on main via cairn-xy1 (PR #134); nothing to back-port now that dev is gone.

Resolved by cairn-87n (feat(map): add CAIRN_TEST_COVERAGE_MISSING gate); spike verdict + implementation both shipped.
Closed

Delivered deterministic upgrade plan: meta/decisions/bd-upgrade-plan.md. Pinned export.auto/git-add in .beads/config.yaml (upgrade-safe). Decision: keep jsonl-in-git, defer bd 1.0.4->1.0.5 bump (bd github + --defer already in 1.0.4; no Dolt remote so migration risk dormant). Re-scoped cairn-y1m to evaluate existing bd github.

Fixed: github-pages environment deployment-branch policy updated dev->main and Pages source set to main (repo was restored to main-as-default with dev retired, but Pages config still pointed at dev). Removed dead dev push trigger from pages.yml (PR #139). Verified: workflow_dispatch deploy (run 28025803010) and push-to-main deploy (run 28026081679) both SUCCEEDED.

Spike resolved: ratified dec.graph-root-fingerprint (meta/decisions/graph-root-fingerprint.md). Verdict: reject versioned graph store; adopt derived Merkle-style graph-root fingerprint bound to a git commit via Cairn-Graph-Root trailer; recompute-and-compare stays the gate (no second source of truth). Implementation deferred to maintainer-gated cairn-9v1.

Implemented in PR #142: dependency-edge drift gate. BlueprintSnapshot schema v2 records per-node outbound edges; check_blueprint_change_decisions emits CAIRN_BLUEPRINT_CHANGE_NO_DECISION on edge-set change without a covering decision; v1 snapshots migrate via migrate_v1_to_v2; edge checks gated on previous.version >= 2 to avoid spurious findings on first scan after upgrade.
Ratified in meta/decisions/toolchain-lint-strictness.md via PR #143.
Spike resolved by dec.bead-github-sync (recommendation: defer / do-not adopt GitHub issues as a second source of truth). Ratified via PR #144.
Landing sources colour from canonical design-system tokens.css; fork deleted; gate extended to cover the landing; PR #146 merged (e671126).
Hero , og:image, twitter:image now point at docs/assets/screenshots/webui-graph.png (Pages origin for social cards); regression test tests/landing_assets.rs added; PR #147 merged (2a01dae).

Spike resolved by dec.beads-task-layer (PR #149, merge ae38af9): surface node-linked beads as a read-only derived view over backlog.rs, not Todo artefacts and not an export bridge; spec.md:11 untouched. Implementation is a follow-up.

Read-only per-node beads view landed (PR #150, merge c0635fe): GET /api/node/<node>/beads + BeadCard/Beads section in the webui inspector, derived from backlog.rs. Orphan-label scan warning (decision rule 4) split to follow-up cairn-lgz.

Orphan task-bead scan warning landed (PR #151, merge da83c5d): checks::check_orphan_beads emits non-blocking CAIRN_BACKLOG_ORPHAN_NODE for beads whose cairn-node label resolves to an unknown node. Completes dec.beads-task-layer rule 4.

Deterministic halves shipped (PR #145 design-token gate, PR #148 a11y gate). AI-vision loop declined by maintainer as out of scope for a deterministic, package.json-less Rust repo; recorded in dec.webui-ai-vision-loop-declined. Reopening requires a superseding decision sanctioning a Node/Playwright toolchain + a vision provider.
Merged in PR #153 (c0c7262): removed unreachable --json branches; query_api is single JSON source of truth; regression test added; all gates green.
Shipped in PR #154 (squash 30ac03b): query-api JSON envelopes carry uniform schema_version

Already fixed on main (f16dae8). Verified empirically 2026-06-26: cairn init --from-code on a synthetic external repo seeds a base cairn.blueprint, scan is clean, and `cairn archive brownfield-init` reports "3 added_nodes, 6 added_edges" and the discovered Module nodes land in cairn.blueprint. All three causes from the report are resolved: (1) emitter src/brownfield/mod.rs:blueprint_delta now writes canonical ## ADDED Nodes/## ADDED Edges that src/changes/delta.rs parses; (2) init --from-code seeds a comment-only base blueprint; (3) post-delta validation + operation:added frontmatter. Governed by accepted dec.brownfield-init-round-trip and regression-guarded by tests/phase_9_brownfield.rs::test_init__round_trip_archive_merges_nodes_into_blueprint (asserts blueprint gains src.alpha/src.beta). Note: cairn refine shares the defect via its own emitter, tracked separately as cairn-h8o.

Already shipped on main (f16dae8). Verified: 'cairn decision new <slug> [--node <id>] [--informed-by <id>]' scaffolds meta/decisions/dec.<slug>.md with correct frontmatter (id: dec.<slug>, nodes, status: proposed, date, and informed_by when --informed-by is passed) plus Context/Decision/Rationale/Consequences sections. The stub introduces zero decision-validation findings (scan-clean). Implemented in src/cli/commands/decision.rs, copy in [decision] of copy.toml, guarded by cli::commands::decision::tests::test_run_decision_new_writes_file_and_refuses_overwrite. The optional 'generalize to cairn artefact new' is not done and is out of scope for this bead's core acceptance.

Already reconciled on main (f16dae8). Verified: exactly one VerificationState enum (src/verification.rs); src/cli/accept.rs uses 'use crate::verification::VerificationState' (line 6) with no private duplicate enum and no #[allow(dead_code)] on its variants; the module is consumed so it is not dead. Gates green (test_verification_state_serde_roundtrip + accept.rs state_str tests pass). Acceptance criteria fully met.

Delivered in PR #167 (commit 2bac4a1): CAIRN_DECISION_CLAIM_UNRESOLVED / CA004 cross-checks 'closes Q-NN' decision prose against declared-items registry status, with unit+integration tests, merged green. The supersede-vs-spec.md half is deliberately deferred via accepted decision dec.decision-claim-cross-check (no structured spec anchor exists, so a gate there would be guess-driven and false-positive-prone). Issue was left open as bookkeeping drift; deterministic deliverable complete.

Delivered in PR #172 (squash d20b9a7): cairn init emits the curated cairn-* dev-loop skills into .claude/skills/ via include_str! single-source bundling + idempotent write loop; agent guide references the loop. Also corrected stale skill commands (cairn apply -> cairn-apply skill; manual mv -> cairn archive; openspec/ -> meta/changes/docs/registries) so the on-ramp is followable. Test test_init_project_emits_cairn_skills_and_loop_guide; all gates + E2E green.

Consolidation + determinism-first triage delivered: 16->15 cairn-* managed skills (merged dup cairn-land-change into cairn-pr-landing; corrected cairn-loop-terminal-state-stop's falsified cfw-collapse claim; pointed cairn-author-decision-and-finding-code at the shipped 'cairn decision new' scaffold). Repo-specific vs general classification recorded in notes. Remaining promote-to-install-pack + skill-creator-eval half deferred to cairn-oax (maintainer-gated).

Audit complete. Gap list: meta/research/res.spec-designed-audit.md. Every Designed integrity/freshness rule and all but two rationale tensions are implemented. 2 confirmed gaps filed: cairn-ay5 (research-orphan tension, spec:632) and the revisit-trigger relevance tension (spec:634). Edge-validation (CE001-003) and docstring-drift (CE004-009) are Declared (sec 17), not Designed gaps; decision-violation gating is v2-deferred; todo coverage is informational.
Implemented BacklogItem::to_json single serializer (PR #186); all summary surfaces route through it; drift (missing node field) resolved.
